prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial. Photography style: golden-hour natural light, earthy ceramic bowls, marble countertops, wooden accents, lavender sprigs. Intimate domestic scenes — new mothers, soft white linens, glass jars with bamboo lids. Emotionally warm, empathy-first, village-like nurturing energy. Not clinical, not corporate — feels like a warm hug from someone who cares. San Diego sunshine filtered through clean white curtains. Trust-building, healing-focused, deeply personal.

Clean, high-trust static ad in the style of a premium Google review card. Background: softly blurred photo of a warm golden-hour kitchen scene with healing soups in ceramic bowls and glass jars on a marble countertop, with a warm, slightly darkened overlay. Centered card element with cream (#F9F7F2) rounded rectangle, subtle drop shadow. Large gold five-star rating (★★★★★) at top. Bold serif headline: "With my second baby I chose to prioritize myself, my nutrition and my healing for my postpartum.". Attribution line below in lighter weight: "— Melinda O., San Diego Mom". Business name/logo lockup bottom center: Mothers Chef — Postpartum Healing Meals. Sage green (#82937E) accent stripe at bottom. Aspect ratio 4:5. Warm, editorial photography style, professional ad composition.

copy.headline: With my second baby I chose to prioritize myself, my nutrition and my healing for my postpartum.
copy.subhead: — Melinda O., San Diego Mom

prompts.notes: Uses verbatim customer testimonial. Reference images of healing soup and delivery scene.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial. Photography style: golden-hour natural light, earthy ceramic bowls, marble countertops, wooden accents, lavender sprigs. Intimate domestic scenes — new mothers, soft white linens, glass jars with bamboo lids. Emotionally warm, empathy-first, village-like nurturing energy.

High-impact before/after split ad. Exact vertical 50/50 split. LEFT SIDE: labeled "BEFORE" in white bold uppercase with subtle dark overlay — shows an exhausted new mother sitting on a couch in dim lighting, messy hair, dark circles under eyes, surrounded by takeout containers and empty coffee cups, looking depleted and overwhelmed. RIGHT SIDE: labeled "AFTER" in sage green (#82937E) bold uppercase — shows the same mother glowing with energy, holding her baby in a bright sunlit kitchen, fresh organic meals in glass jars on the counter, smiling and peaceful. Thin cream dividing line with small circular badge at center reading "Mothers Chef". Bottom strip in sage green (#82937E): cream text "Postpartum Healing Meals | San Diego | motherschefsd.com". Clean, professional, emotionally compelling composition. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: From Surviving to Thriving
copy.subhead: Postpartum Healing Meals | San Diego | motherschefsd.com

prompts.notes: Emotional lifestyle before/after — depleted vs. nourished mother. Reference images include mother+baby delivery shot and glass containers.

Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Premium trust-building static ad featuring a real business owner. Background: clean cream (#F9F7F2) with subtle linen texture. Left side: professional photo of Brittany Griffin (Doula B), a warm, caring woman in a bright white kitchen, holding a beautiful plated dish, genuine smile, natural light. Right side: bold typographic treatment. Large elegant serif headline in deep plum (#4A2E32): "I started Mother's Chef because every mother deserves a village.". Subhead in lighter weight sage green (#82937E): "If you don't have one? We'll be yours.". Signature 'Brittany — Doula B' below in script font. copy.headline: I started Mother's Chef because every mother deserves a village.
copy.subhead: If you don't have one? We'll be yours.

prompts.notes: Founder story ad. Uses Brittany's actual quote from site. Her kitchen photo is the reference image.

copy.subhead: 4 weeks of chef-crafted healing meals. Direct access to Doula B.

prompts.notes: Flagship $897 package ad. Emphasizes value ($1,400) and scarcity (10-15 spots). Payment plans reduce sticker shock.

Direct response two-part static ad with deep empathy. Top half (60%): deep plum (#4A2E32) overlay with bold empathy-first headline in cream (#F9F7F2): "You're not supposed to do this alone.". Smaller italic subhead in warm rust (#B36A5E): "Surviving on crackers and cold leftovers while your body tries to heal isn't strength. It's depletion.". Horizontal sage green divider. Dairy-free. No seed oils. Delivered fresh every Sunday.". CTA: "Start My Healing → motherschefsd.com" in sage green. Mothers Chef logo bottom right. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: You're not supposed to do this alone.
copy.subhead: Surviving on crackers and cold leftovers while your body tries to heal isn't strength. It's depletion.

prompts.notes: Uses the hero headline from the website. This is the core emotional hook — deeply resonant for postpartum mothers.

Bold us-vs-them comparison ad. Clean two-column table layout on cream (#F9F7F2) background. Left column header: "Regular Meal Delivery" in faded gray tone. Right column header: "Mothers Chef" in sage green (#82937E), bold. Six comparison rows:
Row 1: "Designed for Postpartum Recovery" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 2: "Mineral-Dense & Hormone-Balancing" — ✗ vs ✓

Row 4: "No Seed Oils — Ever" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 5: "Created by a Certified Doula" — ✗ vs ✓

Bottom CTA: "Start My Healing → motherschefsd.com". Bold ✗ in faded rust, bold ✓ in sage green (#82937E). Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Not All Meal Delivery Is Designed for You
copy.subhead: Mothers Chef vs. Regular Meal Delivery

prompts.notes: Positions against generic meal prep. The doula-designed + postpartum-specific angle is impossible for competitors to match.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial.

Value-framing static ad that justifies premium pricing. Background: beautiful overhead shot of glass meal containers with healing soups, salads, and snacks on a marble counter, with a lavender sprig and wooden spoon — elegant warm overlay. Top eyebrow in warm rust (#B36A5E): "For about $35/day...". Large elegant serif headline in cream (#F9F7F2): "Your Entire Day of Healing Meals. Organic. Chef-Crafted. Delivered.". Itemized value list in cream: "✓ Mineral-Dense Recovery Soups ✓ Complete Organic Meals ✓ Nourishing Breakfast & Snacks ✓ Gluten-Free & Dairy-Free Kitchen ✓ Free Sunday Delivery". Price callout in sage green (#82937E): "The Nurtured Mother — $249/week". Bottom CTA in sage green strip: "Start My Healing → motherschefsd.com". Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: For about $35/day... Your Entire Day of Healing Meals.
copy.subhead: The Nurtured Mother — $249/week

prompts.notes: Price anchor at $35/day makes $249/week feel reasonable vs. postpartum night nurse ($300-400/night) or eating out.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial.

Direct, conversational objection-handling ad. Clean editorial layout. Background: cream (#F9F7F2). Bold hook framed as a customer question in elegant italic serif, larger size, deep plum (#4A2E32): "But what if I have allergies or dietary restrictions?". Below: honest direct answer paragraph in plum: "Our entire kitchen is 100% gluten-free and dairy-free. Every meal follows a Top 8 Allergen friendly base protocol. We use only organic ingredients — no seed oils, no processed foods, no mystery ingredients. And if you have specific needs for breastfeeding or recovery, just tell us. We'll adapt.". Founder sign-off in sage green (#82937E): "— Brittany, Doula B". Mothers Chef logo and motherschefsd.com at bottom. Feels like a real person answering with care. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: But what if I have allergies or dietary restrictions?
copy.subhead: Our entire kitchen is 100% gluten-free and dairy-free. Top 8 Allergen friendly.

prompts.notes: Addresses dietary restriction concern — critical for postpartum mothers with sensitivities. GF/DF kitchen is a major trust signal.

prompts.prompt:
Soft, nurturing postpartum wellness aesthetic. Sage green (#82937E) and warm rust (#B36A5E) brand palette on cream linen (#F9F7F2) backgrounds with deep plum (#4A2E32) accents. Elegant serif typography (Cormorant Garamond style), warm and editorial.

Bold, confidence-forward guarantee ad. Background: clean sage green (#82937E) with subtle botanical leaf texture. Large elegant serif headline in cream (#F9F7F2): "Feel the Difference in 7 Days — Or Your Next Week Is On Us.". Below: supporting paragraph in cream: "That's our 7-Day Energy Guarantee. You'll notice more energy, less brain fog, and a calmer mind within one week of eating our mineral-dense, organic healing meals. If you don't? Your next week of meals is completely free. That's how confident we are in what real food can do for your recovery.". Brittany headshot in circle frame, bottom left. Signature treatment in cream: "Brittany Griffin, Doula B — Mothers Chef". copy.headline: Feel the Difference in 7 Days — Or Your Next Week Is On Us.
copy.subhead: That's our 7-Day Energy Guarantee.

prompts.notes: The 7-Day Energy Guarantee is a killer hook. Risk reversal removes all fear for new mothers considering the investment.
